question: Define a C++ struct named `Book` with members `title` (std::string), `author` (std::string), and `publication_year` (int). Create an array of three `Book` objects, prompt the user to enter details for each, and then print the details of all books.

test_cases.input:
2000
The Great Gatsby
F. Scott Fitzgerald
1984
Nineteen Eighty-Four
George Orwell
2005
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Douglas Adams
test_cases.expected:
Enter details for three books:

Book 1:
Enter publication year: Enter title: Enter author:
Book 2:
Enter publication year: Enter title: Enter author:
Book 3:
Enter publication year: Enter title: Enter author:

--- Book Details ---

Book 1:
Title: 
Author: The Great Gatsby
Publication Year: 2000

Book 2:
Title: 
Author: Nineteen Eighty-Four
Publication Year: 1984

Book 3:
Title: 
Author: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Publication Year: 2005

errors: Input buffer not properly cleared after numeric input (std::cin >> int), leading to skipped std::getline calls and shifted data (title becomes empty, author gets the intended title).
